title: Simple Outlined Ores - Blue Netherite Edition
description: The same outlined ores pack, but with blue ancient debris! Supports 1.16 - 26.x!
body:
This pack is the same as the original project (https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-outlined-ores), but with blue ancient debris to make it easier to find. This pack works from 1.16 to 26.x, and all the versions in between!

A version of this pack will also work for any snapshot in between (e.g. 1.16 will work for all snapshots from 1.16 - 1.16.1) but be careful around 1.17, as you might get legacy ores, and no outlined deepslate ores. In theory, the 1.21 version will also work as far back as 1.17, but minecraft will say it doesn't. This is an error you can ignore.

Yes, I know that "Blue Netherite" isn't gramatically correct, but it sounds better
